Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system to Lieutenant Pietro Viviano
Summary: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system to Lieutenant Pietro Viviano in the town of New Castle, county of Westchester.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to dedicating a portion of the state highway system to Lieutenant Pietro Viviano
